name: ListStockForOrganizationUnits
description:
List the Stock per product/stocklabel for a subset of OrganizationUnits.

The page size `Limit` has a maximum value of `1.024` for this service (unless `DownloadOverview` is `true`).

If neither `OrganizationUnitIDs` nor `OrganizationUnitSetID` are specified, the service will return an empty result.
auth_description: Requires a user of type `Employee` or `Api` with functionality `Stock:View`

headers.name: EVA-User-Agent
headers.description: The user agent that is making these calls. Don't make this specific per device/browser but per application. This should be of the form: `MyFirstUserAgent/1.0.0`

headers.name: EVA-Requested-OrganizationUnitID
headers.description: The ID of the organization unit to run this request in.

headers.name: EVA-Requested-OrganizationUnit-Query
headers.description: The query that selects the organization unit to run this request in.

headers.name: EVA-IDs-Mode
headers.description: The IDs mode to run this request in. Currently only `ExternalIDs` is supported.

headers.name: EVA-IDs-BackendSystemID
headers.description: The ID of the backend system that is used to resolve the IDs.

request_samples.name: CURL
request_samples.sample:
curl -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "EVA-User-Agent: MyFirstUserAgent/1.0.0" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer <token>" \
  --data '{
  "DateTime": "2025-01-01",
  "DownloadOverview": true,
  "IncludeZeroQuantityStock": true,
  "InitialPageConfig": {
    "Filter": {
      "BackendID": "string",
      "Barcode": "string",
      "CustomID": "string",
      "ProductID": 123,
      "ProductIDs": [
        123
      ],
      "SerialNumber": "string",
      "StockLabelID": 123
    },
    "Limit": 123
  },
  "OrganizationUnitIDs": [
    123
  ],
  "OrganizationUnitSetID": 123,
  "PageConfig": {
    "Filter": {
      "BackendID": "string",
      "Barcode": "string",
      "CustomID": "string",
      "ProductID": 123,
      "ProductIDs": [
        123
      ],
      "SerialNumber": "string",
      "StockLabelID": 123
    },
    "Limit": 123,
    "SortDirection": 1,
    "SortProperty": "string",
    "Start": 123
  },
  "PageToken": "string",
  "Query": "string"
}' \
  https://euw.acme.test.eva-online.cloud/message/ListStockForOrganizationUnits

B.name: DateTime
B.description: View the stock on a certain moment in time

B.name: DownloadOverview
B.deprecation_notice:
**Deprecated since 812:** DownloadOverview is deprecated and will be removed in 2.0.856: Use `DownloadStockOverview` instead.

**Will be removed in 838**
B.description:
When specified, the response will contain an `Url` instead to download the Excel from

**Deprecated since 812:** DownloadOverview is deprecated and will be removed in 2.0.856: Use `DownloadStockOverview` instead.

**Will be removed in 838**

B.name: IncludeZeroQuantityStock
B.description: If specified as true, stock with a quantity of zero is also returned by this service. Defaults to false, meaning that products with a zero stock quantity will not be returned by this service.

B.name: InitialPageConfig
B.description: The initial page configuration. This is only used when requesting the first page of results. Subsequent pages are requested using the `PageToken` property.

B.name: OrganizationUnitIDs
B.description:
The organization units to list the stock for, will be ignored if `OrganizationUnitSetID` is specified

This is the ID of a `OrganizationUnit`

B.name: OrganizationUnitSetID
B.description:
The organization units to list the stock for, when specified, `OrganizationUnitIDs` will be ignored

This is the ID of a `OrganizationUnitSet`

B.name: PageConfig
B.deprecation_notice:
**Deprecated since 838:** PageConfig is deprecated and will be removed in 2.0.882: Use InitialPageConfig/PageToken instead..

**Will be removed in 856**
B.description:
**Deprecated since 838:** PageConfig is deprecated and will be removed in 2.0.882: Use InitialPageConfig/PageToken instead..

**Will be removed in 856**

B.name: PageToken
B.description: The page token from a previous response. This is used to request subsequent pages of results.

B.name: Query
B.description: Filter on products, is used as input in ElasticSearch

G.name: Code
G.description: A unique ID identifying this error.

G.name: Message
G.description: A human-readable message describing the error.

G.name: RequestID
G.description: A unique ID identifying the request. Please provide this ID when contacting support.

G.name: Type
G.description: A short description of the error type.

H.name: ExternalIDs
H.description: When using the `ExternalIDs` mode, this will hold the resolved external IDs.

H.name: IsAsyncResultAvailable
H.description: This is a flag indicating whether the async request is done. If it is `null`, it is not an async service. If it is `false`, the response is not yet available. Do not process the properties in that case. It is is `true` the properties are filled with the result of the call.

H.name: UnresolvedExternalIDs
H.description: When using the `ExternalIDs` mode, this will hold the external IDs we couldn't resolve.

K.name: exclusive_sellable_tier
K.description: Name of the first tier this product is sellable for, only present if the product is NEVER sellable for the current user.

K.name: exclusive_tier_remaining_points
K.description: If the ExclusiveSellableTier is present, this field contains the number of points remaining for the user to reach that tier. Other additonal requirements may apply.

K.name: has_rules
K.description: Indicates whether there are any assortment rules that apply to this product for the current user. This is only returned for employees

K.name: is_visible
K.description: Indicates whether the product is visible to the user. This is only returned for employees, as for customers this product isn't returned at all.

K.name: message
K.description: Message that can be shown to the user when either SellableTier or ExclusiveSellableTier is present, to communicate why the product is or isn't sellable.

K.name: sellable_date
K.description: Date when the product becomes sellable. Present when the product is visible but not yet purchasable.

K.name: sellable_tier
K.description: Name of the tier that is the reason why this product is sellable for this user, only present if this product is not sellable by default but it is for this user.

K.name: shipment_date
K.description: Date when the product becomes shippable. Present when the product is sellable but not yet shippable (pre-sale).

J.name: BackendID
J.description: This is the ID of a `Product`

J.name: ID
J.description: This is the ID of a `Product`

J.name: Status
J.description:
Flags enum, combine any of the below values:

* `0` - None
* `1` - PreRelease
* `4` - DeliveryOnly
* `8` - DisableDelivery
* `16` - DisablePickup
* `32` - DisableBackorder
* `34` - UseUp
* `64` - NonSellable
* `128` - CarryOutOnly

J.name: Type
J.description:
Flags enum, combine any of the below values:

* `0` - None
* `1` - Stock
* `2` - Insurance
* `4` - Marketing
* `8` - GiftCard
* `16` - Service
* `32` - GreetingCard
* `64` - CustomPricing
* `128` - External
* `256` - OrderCosts
* `512` - SystemGenerated
* `1024` - ProductSet
* `2048` - BundleProduct
* `4096` - VirtualProduct
* `8192` - MadeToOrder
* `16384` - Configurable
* `32768` - SupplierProduct
* `65536` - Template
* `131072` - SecondChance
* `262144` - NotReturnable
* `524289` - StockAggregate
* `1048576` - SubscriptionProduct
* `2097152` - Event
